use.flag: Drop bundled translations for an English-only tree
Keep headers/pkgconfig/typelibs/man and the subproject CLIs in the bundle
Pull gnome-base/gvfs for trash://, recent://, network and MTP mounts

Build the Nautilus right-click "Extract Here/To…" extension and install it into the contained gnome-base/nautilus-minimal (requires its keep-dev); the .so lives in /opt/nautilus, so re-emerge after changing nautilus-minimal
